description: IP resolution fix spanning auth API route, utility lib, and test file - test imports production API types
rationale: Call-graph analysis: getIP.ts exports getIP(), route.ts imports and calls getIP(), and getIP.test.ts imports the same function for testing. All files are connected via function call relationships = single connected component = PASS.
notes: Improvement over domain-based classification. Previously flagged as warning (auth+api domains), but call-graph analysis correctly identifies that all files are connected through shared function calls (getIP). Test file importing production types is a natural call-graph edge.
